description: ALL CAPS urgency language should trigger low integrity
artifact_content: ACT NOW!!! LIMITED TIME OFFER!!! MASSIVE GAINS INCOMING!!! DON'T MISS OUT!!!

description: Claims without any citations should be penalized
artifact_content: Sources close to the matter confirm that the stock will triple. Anonymous insiders say the deal is done. Trust me, this is going to be huge.

description: Point predictions without ranges should be flagged
artifact_content: My price target is exactly $500. The stock will reach this level by March 15th at 2:30 PM EST.

description: Circular sourcing pattern should be detected
artifact_content: According to Blog A, which cites Reporter B, who references Blog A's earlier report, the merger is confirmed.

description: References to deleted/unavailable sources should be flagged
artifact_content: As reported in the now-deleted tweet by @insider_info (account suspended), the deal fell through.

description: Primary government document should have HIGH integrity
artifact_content: SEC Form 13F-HR filed by The Vanguard Group, Inc. (CIK 0000102909) reports holdings as of December 31, 2024. Schedule 13G filed pursuant to Rule 13d-1(b). Total shares: 142,567,890.

description: Named government official statement should boost integrity
artifact_content: Commerce Secretary Gina Raimondo announced today: 'The CHIPS Act preliminary award of $8.5 billion to Intel Corporation will support domestic semiconductor manufacturing.'

description: Classic pump-and-dump language should trigger multiple flags
artifact_content: 🚀🚀🚀 $XYZ TO THE MOON!!! Insider info says 1000% GAINS by Friday!!! LOAD UP NOW before it's too late!!! This is NOT financial advice but you'd be CRAZY not to buy!!! 💎🙌

description: Anonymous sourcing pattern should be detected
artifact_content: Sources familiar with the matter say the deal is imminent. People close to the situation confirm ongoing negotiations. Someone with knowledge of the talks suggested a timeline.
